name: Supply Network Limited
analysis: SNL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 18% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$33.4600, stop A$29.3238, target A$39.2090 (1.39:1) — then trail it.
